GIMP Color Palettes

Share on Twitter →

A collection of color palettes for GIMP and Inkscape,

but also Aseprite, Drawpile, Krita and MyPaint.
  • 24 Color Palettes
  • MIT Licensed
  • Version 0.1.0-beta
Download All View on GitHub

Palettes

Apple II Colors CSS Commodore 16 Commodore 64 Commodore VIC-20 Elementary OS Enhanced Graphics Adapter Flat UI Game Boy HIG Breeze HTML Colors Materialize CSS Mattel Aquarius Metro UI Nintendo Entertainment System PICO-8 RAL Classic Sega Master System Semantic UI Tachyons Tailwind CSS v1 Tailwind CSS v2 Tango Desktop Project Teletex

GIMP Color Palettes

A collection of color palettes for GIMP and Inkscape,
but also Aseprite, Drawpile, Krita and MyPaint.

  • 24 Color Palettes
  • MIT Licensed
  • Version 0.1.0-beta

Check out the source code on GitHub →
